1001.name: Highwayman
1001.description: A ragged figure in a torn cloak, wielding a rusty shortsword. He blocks the road with false bravado.

1002.name: Hollow Wolf
1002.description: A gaunt wolf with glowing green eyes. Its ribs are visible through matted fur. It snarls at your approach.

1003.name: Undead Royal Guard
1003.description: A skeletal soldier in rusted armor. Its empty eye sockets burn with a cold blue flame. It raises a notched sword at your approach.

1004.name: Cursed Archer
1004.description: A ghostly figure holding a spectral bow. Arrows of shadow materialize as it draws the string.

1005.name: The Usurper Wraith
1005.description: A towering specter wearing a burning crown. The air freezes in its presence. This is the thing that shattered the kingdom.

2001.name: Alley Scavenger
2001.description: A desperate local in a patched rain slicker, wielding a sharpened pipe. Looking for easy prey in the neon-lit gutters.

2002.name: CorpSec Drone
2002.description: A hovering security robot armed with a stun baton. Its single red eye tracks you with mechanical precision.

2003.name: Security Chief
2003.description: A heavily augmented corporate enforcer. Chrome plating covers half his face. He does not ask questions.

2004.name: Cyber-Ninja Assassin
2004.description: A blur of chrome and monomolecular steel. It moves faster than your eyes can track. The final guardian of the Mainframe Core.

3001.name: Street Thug
3001.description: A goon in a cheap suit holding a switchblade.

3002.name: Corrupt Cop
3002.description: A police officer who took the wrong bribe.

3003.name: Syndicate Hitman
3003.description: A professional killer in a trench coat.

3004.name: Mob Enforcer
3004.description: A mountain of muscle carrying a tommy gun.

3005.name: Don Carmine
3005.description: The boss of the underworld. He looks furious that his vault was breached.

4001.name: Jungle Mercenary
4001.description: A hired gun in camo fatigues.

4002.name: Elite Commando
4002.description: A heavily armed soldier with a red beret.

4003.name: Heavy Gunner
4003.description: A massive soldier carrying a minigun.

4004.name: Cyborg Guard
4004.description: An experimental super-soldier. Half man, half machine.

4005.name: General Krieg
4005.description: The rogue dictator. He wields a massive rocket launcher.

5001.name: Novice Monk
5001.description: A young student of the martial arts.

5002.name: Wind Ninja
5002.description: A swift assassin moving like the breeze.

5005.name: Grandmaster Shen
5005.description: An old man whose power is terrifying.

6005.name: Emperor Nero
6005.description: The mad emperor, returned from the grave.

8001.name: Warden Kael
8001.description: A grizzled veteran with scars from a dozen realms. His eyes are sharp despite his age. He trains newcomers in the basics of combat.

dialogue.text: Another traveler from beyond the veil. You'll need to learn to fight if you want to survive out there. The dummies are free to use — type 'attack' when you find an enemy.
You solved the Throne Room puzzle? Impressive. The marble fled deeper — I've heard rumors of it in the Neon Grid. Be careful out there.

8002.name: Merchant Zara
8002.description: A sharp-eyed woman in mismatched clothing from half a dozen realms. She runs the Bazaar with an iron fist and a silver tongue.

dialogue.text: Buying or selling? I deal in goods from every realm. Check the board for player listings. If you find anything shiny out there, bring it back — I pay fair prices.

8003.name: Old Merchant Giles
8003.description: A stooped old man with kind eyes and ink-stained fingers. He sells basic supplies and knows every rumor in Thornhold.

dialogue.text: Welcome, traveler. Something strange rolled through the market last night — left a groove in the cobblestones heading toward the castle. Here, take this healing draught. You'll need it.
Still hunting that strange rolling thing? Last I heard, it went straight through the castle gates. The guards couldn't stop it — it was too fast. Be careful in there.

8004.name: Detective Vance
8004.description: A tired PI nursing a black coffee.

dialogue.text: You looking for that rolling thing too? It smashed right through Carmine's vault. You'll need the brass key from his office safe to get in. The combo is the year the war ended — 1945.

8005.name: Captured Spy
8005.description: A bruised agent tied to a chair.

dialogue.text: They're launching the missile! You have to abort it. The code is in the control room, but you have to enter it at the silo console. Hurry!

8006.name: Old Hermit
8006.description: A wise old man sweeping the steps.

dialogue.text: You seek the round stone? It flew past here like a shooting star. To follow it, you must light the four braziers with the Flame of the Masters. Search the pavilions.
A round object? Yes, it smashed right through the Emperor's tomb! To get down there, you need the Lion's Eye gem to open the catacomb mechanism.
